name: Beef Barley Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons beef base OR 4 bouillon cubes
2 tablespoons chicken base OR 4 bouillon cubes
recipeInstructions:
Salt and pepper to taste.
In a large pot, sauté the vegetables in butter until tender. In a separate pan, cook the ground beef and drain any excess fat. Add the cooked beef to the pot with the vegetables. Stir in the beef or chicken base (2 tablespoons) and 3 quarts of water. Add the pearl barley and simmer for 30 minutes, seasoning with salt and pepper as desired.
